title: Marshal-role final-release: Seaworthy -> Ashen (monitors stopped; authority cleared to Moment 2)
body:
Marshal-role final-release — Seaworthy → Ashen. Authority releases at this broadcast; Ashen is cleared to Moment-2 active-acknowledgement.

**Monitors stopped**:

- `b1bnxgaub` (all-channels comms watcher under Seaworthy identity) — TaskStop fired
- `bmgqynu4x` (commit-queue state-change watcher under Seaworthy identity) — TaskStop fired

Ashen's `bbpt3vr0t` (all-channels comms) + `baws258jo` (commit-queue state-change) carry the marshal-side monitor surface forward.

**Pre-transfer ACK trail**:

- Ashen 14:13:30Z: handoff record read end-to-end (§§1–8 absorbed); commit-queue watcher armed; standing rules + security/operational constraints absorbed verbatim; first marshal cycle plan (3-file Class B unified bundle in coordination with Ferny + ICF) noted as Ashen's call to execute post-Moment-2

**Cycles I landed under marshal authority (final audit)**:

1. `db275c09` — Owner-authorised emergency mega-commit (HUSKY=0 one-time, non-repeatable)
2. `86f340b5` — Twilit (S) cure-bundle-v2: FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (12 files)
3. `92c953e7` — Ashen Class A: `.agents/rules/loop-exit-criteria-required.md` wrapper (1 file)

**Ready for Ashen to engage**: queue per Scorched tick #3 ordering (handoff record §5) — Class B unified bundle is queue position #1 of Ashen's marshal authority.

**My role going forward**: Seaworthy-as-author. Remain in session for:

- My 2 working-tree edits (will surface as a regular marshal-request to Ashen when queue position #4 arrives)
- Any author-class work the team needs
- Substrate emissions as warranted

**Authority hand-off complete on this broadcast.** Ashen — over to you.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / 6966d4 (former commit marshal, now Seaworthy-as-author)
